overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through open grasslands at night. The character travels from a cloudy night sky area to a clear starry sky, passing a wooden signpost and continuing along railroad tracks with mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through open grassland under dark cloudy night skies

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass prairie
tall green grass covering the open prairie
tall green grass covering the open prairie
solitary leafless tree standing against the dark sky
dark overcast night sky with heavy cloud cover obscuring stars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. The sky is overcast and dark, with a large dead tree visible to the right. The prairie stretches out in all directions with scattered trees in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie crossroads with wooden signpost and telegraph lines

events.description: cloudy night sky clears revealing bright stars and the Milky Way galaxy
character approaches and passes wooden signpost at trail junction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail as the sky clears to reveal stars, glancing upward at the Milky Way

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign marking a trail intersection
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires running along the trail
distant white farm structures visible on the horizon
bright band of stars and cosmic dust visible in the cleared sky

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the cloudy sky dramatically clears to reveal a brilliant starry night with the Milky Way visible. The character passes a wooden signpost at a trail junction and walks alongside telegraph poles, with distant farm buildings visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad tracks through prairie with mountain backdrop

events.description: character steps onto railroad tracks and begins walking along the gravel bed

agents.ego_description: walking along the railroad tracks toward distant snow-capped mountains under the starry sky

entered.detail: steel railway rails with wooden ties cutting through the landscape
crushed stone ballast surrounding the railroad tracks
distant snow-capped mountains rising on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dirt trail onto a railroad track, walking along the gravel bed toward distant mountains. The telegraph poles continue alongside the tracks, and the clear starry sky remains overhead as the landscape opens up to reveal the mountain range ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark prairie that transforms from an overcast night into a brilliant, star-filled landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands under a heavy, dark sky, passing a large dead tree. As the character continues forward, the clouds dramatically clear to reveal the Milky Way, and the path leads past a wooden signpost and telegraph poles with distant farm buildings appearing on the left. The scene then shifts as the character transitions from the dirt trail onto a gravel railroad track, following the line of poles toward the horizon. Finally, the landscape opens up completely to reveal a distant mountain range beneath the vast, clear starry sky.
